heading: Prohibited acts
label: 2615 Prohibited acts
notes: Effective DateSection effective 6 months after , except that, in the case of collective bargaining agreements in effect on that effective date, section applicable on the earlier of (1) the date of termination of such agreement, or (2) the date that occurs 12 months after , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 5, 1993Feb. 5, 1993section 405(b) of Pub. L. 103–3section 2601 of this title

children.heading: Exercise of rights
children.label: 1 Exercise of rights
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any employer to interfere with, restrain, or deny the exercise of or the attempt to exercise, any right provided under this subchapter.

children.heading: Discrimination
children.label: 2 Discrimination
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any employer to discharge or in any other manner discriminate against any individual for opposing any practice made unlawful by this subchapter.

children.heading: Interference with proceedings or inquiries
children.label: b Interference with proceedings or inquiries

children.text: has filed any charge, or has instituted or caused to be instituted any proceeding, under or related to this subchapter;
has given, or is about to give, any information in connection with any inquiry or proceeding relating to any right provided under this subchapter; or
has testified, or is about to testify, in any inquiry or proceeding relating to any right provided under this subchapter.
